com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.futurex

Interface FutureX

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface FutureX
extends Module
    Provides the ability to execute FutureX RKL process.

    How to get this module:

         FutureX futureX = (FutureX)NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.FUTUREX);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.List<InstalledKeyInfo> getInstalledKeyInfo()
      Gets detail info of installed keys.
      int getInstalledKeyNum()
      Gets the number of installed keys.
      byte[] getPEDI()
      Gets PEDI request data from device.
      byte[] getPEDK()
      Gets PEDK request data from device.
      byte[] getPEDV()
      Gets PEDV request data from device.
      void setDeviceGroup(java.lang.String name)
      Sets device group.
      void setDeviceSignCertIndex(byte index)
      Sets index of device sign cert.
      void setPEDI(byte[] data)
      Sets PEDI response data to device.
      void setPEDK(byte[] data)
      Sets PEDK response data to device.
      void setPEDV(byte[] data)
      Sets PEDV response data to device.
      void setWorkDirectory(java.lang.String directory)
      Sets application file directory.

    • Method Detail

      • getPEDI

        byte[] getPEDI()
        throws NSDKException
        Gets PEDI request data from device.
        Returns:
        PEDI request data to be sent to host.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setPEDI

        void setPEDI(byte[] data)
      throws NSDKException
        Sets PEDI response data to device.
        Parameters:
        data - PEDI response data received from host.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getPEDK

        byte[] getPEDK()
        throws NSDKException
        Gets PEDK request data from device.
        Returns:
        PEDK request data to be sent to host.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setPEDK

        void setPEDK(byte[] data)
      throws NSDKException
        Sets PEDK response data to device.
        Parameters:
        data - PEDK response data received from host.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getPEDV

        byte[] getPEDV()
        throws NSDKException
        Gets PEDV request data from device.
        Returns:
        PEDV request data to be sent to host.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setPEDV

        void setPEDV(byte[] data)
      throws NSDKException
        Sets PEDV response data to device.
        Parameters:
        data - PEDV response data received from host.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getInstalledKeyNum

        int getInstalledKeyNum()
                throws NSDKException
        Gets the number of installed keys.
        Returns:
        How many keys installed for the last time RKL process.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getInstalledKeyInfo

        java.util.List<InstalledKeyInfo> getInstalledKeyInfo()
                                              throws NSDKException
        Gets detail info of installed keys.
        Returns:
        Detail info of installed keys for the last RKL process. See InstalledKeyInfo.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setDeviceSignCertIndex

        void setDeviceSignCertIndex(byte index)
                     throws NSDKException
        Sets index of device sign cert.
        Parameters:
        index - Index of device sign cert.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setDeviceGroup

        void setDeviceGroup(java.lang.String name)
             throws NSDKException
        Sets device group.
        Parameters:
        name - Device group name.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setWorkDirectory

        void setWorkDirectory(java.lang.String directory)
               throws NSDKException
        Sets application file directory.
        Parameters:
        directory - Application file directory.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
